highlights.text: I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend.
On the chart, they leave behind a footprint when they do this, and that footprint is my core setup: The Failed Breakdown .
It is for this reason that I prefer to trade failed breakdowns on FOMC days.” We certainly saw this yesterday and after an initial FOMC spike up to 6680s, ES sold down to 6611 low of day.

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll run down some of the ample Failed Breakdown’s we’ve had this week as its been one of the best weeks this year: Just since Sunday open we had 5, and this is unusual.

post_title: SPX Is Coiled Tight At All Time Highs. Is Another Big Push Up Coming, Or Are Bulls Exhausted? Sept 19 Plan
